animatedDemo.title: Support flow in motion
animatedDemo.subtitle: Nine steps from inquiry to resolution — transparent, auditable, human-controlled.

1.title: Inquiry arrives
1.detail: Support request enters from email, chat, or your admin.

2.title: Triage
2.detail: Category, urgency, and routing assessed automatically.

3.title: Business DNA
3.detail: Templates, tone, and escalation rules applied.

4.title: Knowledge match
4.detail: Approved knowledge sources searched — no raw chat storage.

5.title: Draft prepared
5.detail: Response or action draft ready for review.

6.title: Confidence scored
6.detail: Low confidence triggers escalation — never silent guessing.

7.title: Risk check
7.detail: Sensitive actions blocked until explicit approval.

8.title: Human approval
8.detail: Your team approves, edits, or rejects.

9.title: Resolved & logged
9.detail: Outcome recorded in audit trail — metadata only.

animatedDemo.mobileSummary: Inquiry → triage → knowledge → draft → approval → resolution

earlyAccess.name: Full name
earlyAccess.success: Thank you — we will be in touch shortly.
earlyAccess.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email support@aipify.ai.
earlyAccess.privacy: We store only the information you provide to respond to your request. Aipify does not sell lead data.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.subtitle: Questions about early access, enterprise, or partnerships.
contact.note: For Control Center access, use your existing account or register for a trial.

ownership.title: You own your data
ownership.body: Customer operational data belongs to the customer. Aipify owns the intelligence layer — metadata, patterns, and approved learning summaries only.

noSurveillance.title: No employee surveillance
noSurveillance.body: Aipify does not monitor employees, keystrokes, screens, or workplace activity. Presence indicators reflect system state — not individual surveillance.

collection.title: What we collect
collection.body: Account information, installation metadata, configuration, and anonymised operational metrics. We do not store raw email content, chat transcripts, or payment records in learning memory.

license.title: Software license
license.body: Aipify is proprietary software owned by Aipify Group AS. Customers receive a license to use the service — not ownership of the software.

use.title: Acceptable use
use.body: Use Aipify in compliance with applicable law and your organization's policies. Do not attempt to bypass tenant isolation or approval controls.

knowledgePage.title: Knowledge Center
knowledgePage.subtitle: Vanlige spørsmål om Aipify.
knowledgePage.faqIntro: Åpne svar om produktet, tillit og enterprise-beredskap.

1.a: Aipify er en digital medarbeider som hjelper virksomheten din med å holde orden, svare raskere og jobbe smartere. Formelt er det et Aipify Business Operating System (ABOS) for support, kunnskap, oppfølging, drift, leveranser, tillit og klarhet.

2.a: Nei. Aipify er en digital medarbeider — et Aipify Business Operating System (ABOS) for support, kunnskap, oppfølging, drift, leveranser, tillit og klarhet. Chat er én flate; produktet er operativ assistanse med menneskelig kontroll.

3.a: Nei. Aipify forsterker mennesker. Den forbereder utkast, organiserer kunnskap og håndterer repeterende arbeid innen godkjente rammer. Teamet ditt tar de viktige beslutningene.

4.a: Aipify hjelper virksomheten din med å holde orden, svare raskere og jobbe smartere — gjennom support, kunnskap, oppfølging, drift, leveranser, tillitskontroller og forklarbar klarhet.

5.a: Nei. Aipify er ikke overvåkingsprogramvare. Den skal ikke overvåke skjermer, tastetrykk, private filer eller nettleserhistorikk.

6.a: Ja. Aipify kan generere rapporter, sammendrag, sertifikater, regneark, presentasjoner og andre forretningsleveranser.

7.q: Kan Aipify brukes av større selskaper?
7.a: Ja. Aipify er bygget med multi-tenant-arkitektur, roller, tillatelser, revisjonslogger, SSO-beredskap og enterprise-utrulling.

8.q: Hvordan blir Aipify mer nyttig over tid?
8.a: Organisasjoner kan gradvis delegere godkjente arbeidsflyter til Aipify gjennom eksplisitte, reversible og reviderbare tillitspolicyer.

lines: Aipify Growth Partners bygger kundeporteføljer rundt Aipify-produkter og -tjenester.
Du fokuserer på kunder. Aipify håndterer plattform, abonnement, support, infrastruktur og produktutvikling.

certificationExperience.title: Professional certification included.
certificationExperience.intro: Every Growth Partner completes certification before active selling. The program builds trust with customers and ensures you understand how to position Aipify professionally.

commissionTransparency.title: Transparent commission structure.
paragraphs: Growth Partners should always know what they earned, why they earned it, when payouts occur, and how performance is calculated.
Commission rules, attribution, and payout history are visible inside the Growth Partner portal — no hidden calculations.
Transparency builds trust between Aipify, partners, and the customers you serve.

partnerBusinessModel.title: Build a real business.
paragraphs: Aipify Growth Partners are not affiliates. They are business partners who operate through their own registered companies.
You focus on relationships, discovery, and customer success. Aipify handles platform delivery, subscriptions, product development, and governance.

steps.title: Start selling

requirements.title: Two requirements
items: You must operate through a registered business.
You must complete Aipify training and certification before active selling rights are granted.
requirements.copy: Valid business registration and completed certification are required. Aipify does not guarantee income — earnings depend on your activity and customer outcomes.

earnings.title: Build recurring revenue
earnings.copy: Aipify Growth Partners earn recurring commissions from qualified customers they bring to Aipify.
earnings.disclaimer: No guaranteed income. Earnings depend on your sales activity, customer retention, plan value, commission settings, and active partner status. Commission rules are visible inside the Growth Partner dashboard.

businessPacks.status: Add Business Packs when your operational scope expands.

included.title: What is included in every plan

roiExplanation.title: Aipify er designet for å redusere operasjonell friksjon.
roiExplanation.intro: Praktisk operasjonell forbedring — ikke urealistiske ROI-løfter.

upgradeExperience.title: Oppgrader umiddelbart.
upgradeExperience.intro: When a subscription changes, your organization keeps working — no waiting, no support tickets, no downtime.

upgradePath.headline: Din vekstplan
upgradePath.copy: Where you are today → which plan fits → what comes next. Upgrade naturally without changing platforms.

items.question: Can I start small?
items.answer: Yes. Starter is designed for teams beginning with operational visibility — expand only when you need more.

items.question: Can I upgrade later?
items.answer: Yes. Upgrade at any time. Subscription, permissions, and features update immediately after payment.

items.question: Can I add Business Packs later?
items.answer: Yes. Activate Business Packs as your operational scope grows — you never need everything on day one.

items.question: Can I add users later?
items.answer: Yes. Add users as your organization expands. Plan limits scale with your subscription.

items.question: Can I add domains later?
items.answer: Yes. Domain capacity grows with your plan as you connect more of your organization.

items.question: Can I move to Enterprise later?
items.answer: Yes. Most organizations start smaller and move to Enterprise when governance, scale, or deployment requirements increase.

purchasingConfidence.title: Kjøp med trygghet.
paragraphs: Aipify er designet for langsiktig vekst.
Ikke press. Ikke unødvendig kompleksitet. Bare operasjonell forbedring.

contactSales.headline: Usikker på hvilken plan som passer i dag?
contactSales.subheadline: A consultative conversation helps identify the right starting point and what comes next.

billingArchitecture.title: Billing options
billingArchitecture.accounting: Fiken integration for Norwegian accounting workflows.

pricingPage.finalPrinciple: Prising skal føles som en vekstplan — der dere er i dag, hvilken plan som passer, og hva som kommer neste — ikke en programvaresammenligningstabell.

items.question: How long is the demo?
items.answer: Typically 45–60 minutes — tailored to your priorities, not a fixed script.

items.question: Do I need technical knowledge?
items.answer: No. We focus on operational outcomes. Technical stakeholders are welcome to join.

items.question: Can I invite colleagues?
items.answer: Yes. We encourage the right decision-makers and day-to-day operators to attend.

items.question: Can we discuss custom Business Packs?
items.answer: Yes. We review industry packs and discuss fit for your organization.

items.question: Can Aipify integrate with our systems?
items.answer: We discuss install-first integration during implementation planning — read-only first, expand with approval.

growthPartnerTermsPage.title: Growth Partner vilkår og betingelser
growthPartnerTermsPage.updated: Aipify Group AS · Bergen. Norge. For verden.
growthPartnerTermsPage.intro: Disse vilkårene regulerer det uavhengige Growth Partner-forholdet med Aipify Group AS.

independent.title: 1. Independent Business Relationship
independent.body: Growth Partners operate as independent business operators. Growth Partners are not employees of Aipify Group AS.

tax.title: 2. Tax Responsibility
tax.body: Growth Partners are responsible for their own taxes, VAT, accounting, local reporting obligations, and registration with relevant tax authorities in their own country or jurisdiction.

accurateInfo.title: 3. Accurate Information
accurateInfo.body: Growth Partner confirms that registration information is correct, complete, and up to date.

brand.title: 4. Brand Representation
brand.body: Growth Partners represent Aipify products and services and must follow Aipify Group AS brand and conduct guidelines.

certification.title: 5. Certification Requirement
certification.body: Growth Partners must complete required training and certification before active selling rights are granted. Certification applies to Aipify product and sales training only.

commission.title: 6. Commission Program
commission.body: Commissions are calculated according to Aipify Group AS partner rules. Commission structures may be updated by Aipify Group AS according to published partner terms.

ownership.title: 7. Customer Ownership
ownership.body: All customers belong to Aipify Platform. Growth Partners receive attribution and commission only. Growth Partners do not own customers.

compliance.title: 8. Compliance
compliance.body: Growth Partners must comply with applicable local laws and regulations.

suspension.title: 9. Account Suspension
suspension.body: Aipify Group AS may suspend or terminate partner accounts for fraud, abuse, misrepresentation, brand misuse, policy violations, or illegal activity.

noGuarantee.title: 10. No Income Guarantee
noGuarantee.body: Aipify does not guarantee income. Earnings depend on partner activity, customer purchases, retention, commission rules, and active partner status.

1.title: Companion
1.explanation: Aipify's executive intelligence layer — briefings, priorities, and guidance grounded in your operational context.
1.workflow: Ask a question → Aipify gathers context → Presents insight with recommended next step.
1.value: Leadership clarity without chasing updates across disconnected tools.

2.title: Knowledge Center
2.explanation: Approved knowledge, playbooks, and onboarding paths — accessible to the right roles at the right time.
2.workflow: Question raised → Knowledge search → Approved answer with source context.
2.value: Institutional knowledge stays current, visible, and usable.

3.title: Operations Center
3.explanation: Day-to-day operational coordination — tasks, handoffs, and team visibility in one workspace.
3.workflow: Alert received → Review context → Assign or approve → Track to completion.
3.value: Teams move work forward with shared visibility and fewer manual follow-ups.

4.title: Trust Center
4.explanation: Transparency for permissions, audit trails, data ownership, and governance controls.
4.workflow: Sensitive action proposed → Policy check → Human approval → Audit logged.
4.value: Enterprise confidence that Aipify operates within approved boundaries.

5.title: Business Packs
5.explanation: Modular domain capabilities — activate only the operational packs your organization needs.
5.workflow: Select pack → Configure for your domain → Operate with domain-specific workflows.
5.value: Right-sized capability without unnecessary software sprawl.

6.title: Executive Center
6.explanation: Strategic visibility for leadership — revenue context, risks, approvals, and operational health.
6.workflow: Daily briefing prepared → Risks surfaced → Decisions prepared for review.
6.value: Executives see what matters and what to act on — not raw noise.

liveWorkflows.title: Se hvordan arbeid flyter gjennom Aipify.

1.question: What changed this week?
1.answer: Three operational shifts need attention: support volume increased 12%, two approvals are overdue, and inventory for SKU-442 is below threshold. I recommend reviewing the support queue first — it affects customer response times today.

2.question: Show revenue risks.
2.answer: Two renewal conversations lack owner assignment, and one enterprise account shows declining engagement. I have prepared a summary with recommended owners and suggested follow-up timing for your review.

3.question: Prepare board report.
3.answer: I can prepare a draft board summary covering operational health, key risks, and strategic priorities from approved sources. Would you like me to include support metrics and approval backlog status?

4.question: What should I focus on today?
4.answer: Your highest-impact items: approve the vendor contract waiting since Monday, review the weekly operations briefing, and assign an owner to the overdue support escalation. Each includes context and estimated effort.

5.question: Which approvals need attention?
5.answer: Four approvals are pending: two support responses, one inventory reorder, and one policy exception. The inventory reorder is time-sensitive — stock falls below minimum in 48 hours if not approved.

organizationalMemory.title: Organisasjoner bør ikke glemme.
organizationalMemory.closing: Aipify hjelper med å bevare organisasjonskunnskap og operasjonell kontekst.

sinceLastLogin.title: Vit hva som har endret seg.

leaders.need: Leaders do not need more dashboards.

managers.need: Managers do not need more reports.

employees.need: Employees do not need more systems.

paragraphs.1: For decades organizations have purchased separate systems for separate problems.
paragraphs.2: The future belongs to platforms that connect people, knowledge, workflows, governance and operational visibility.
paragraphs.3: Aipify is being built for that future.

aipifyVision.title: Én plattform. Én Companion. Ubegrensede muligheter.

paragraphs.2: Aipify adapts through Business Packs, integrations, governance and Companion capabilities.
paragraphs.3: The platform grows with the organization. Not the other way around.

1.a: Kundens driftsdata tilhører kunden. Aipify lagrer metadata, styringsposter og godkjent konfigurasjon — avgrenset per tenant med streng isolasjon.

2.a: Rollebasert tilgangskontroll knyttes til organisasjonsstrukturen. Eiere og administratorer styrer tillatelser; sensitive funksjoner følger minste-privilegium.

3.a: Sensitive handlinger krever eksplisitt menneskelig godkjenning. Policyer definerer hva Aipify kan forberede versus hva som må godkjennes — med full revisjon.

4.a: Tenant-isolasjon, verifiserte domener, installasjonskontekst og RBAC sørger for at brukere kun ser det rollen og organisasjonen tillater.

5.a: Companion observerer godkjente kilder, forklarer kontekst, forbereder anbefalinger og koordinerer arbeid — mennesker beslutter, godkjenner og er ansvarlige.

6.a: Aipify er designet for styring, revisjonssynlighet, modulære Business Packs og konsultativ utrulling — med enterprise-arkitektur på vei for SSO og utvidede kontroller.

what-is-a-business-operating-system.title: What is a Business Operating System?
what-is-a-business-operating-system.metaDescription: A Business Operating System coordinates knowledge, operations, governance, and intelligence — beyond chatbots and point tools.
what-is-a-business-operating-system.introduction: Most organizations run on disconnected software: a helpdesk here, spreadsheets there, chat tools everywhere. A Business Operating System (BOS) unifies operational coordination — with human control built in.

sections.heading: Beyond single-purpose tools
sections.body: A BOS connects support, knowledge, workflows, approvals, and executive visibility. It does not replace your ERP or CRM — it orchestrates operational intelligence above them.

sections.heading: Governed by design
sections.body: Sensitive actions require human approval. Policies define what Aipify may prepare versus execute. Every important step is auditable.

sections.heading: Modular activation
sections.body: Organizations activate Business Packs and modules as needed — hospitality, support, warehouse, finance — without unnecessary complexity.

examples.title: Support escalation
examples.body: A support case arrives → Aipify triages with Business DNA → Drafts a response → Human approves before send → Audit logged.

why-organizations-need-operational-visib.title: Why organizations need operational visibility
why-organizations-need-operational-visib.metaDescription: Operational visibility helps leaders and teams see what matters, what is blocked, and what to act on — without surveillance or noise.
why-organizations-need-operational-visib.introduction: When work is scattered across inboxes, chats, and siloed dashboards, leaders spend time chasing updates instead of making decisions. Operational visibility brings signal to one governed layer.

sections.heading: Executive clarity without micromanagement
sections.body: Aipify surfaces priorities, risks, and prepared actions — not keystroke monitoring or employee surveillance.

sections.heading: Cross-team coordination
sections.body: Operations, support, and leadership share context through approved knowledge and coordinated workflows.

examples.title: Morning briefing
examples.body: Aipify prepares an executive briefing: open approvals, support trends, and operational items requiring attention — each with recommended next steps.

how-operational-knowledge-creates-compet.title: How operational knowledge creates competitive advantage
how-operational-knowledge-creates-compet.metaDescription: Organizations that capture, approve, and reuse operational knowledge respond faster and onboard teams more consistently.
how-operational-knowledge-creates-compet.introduction: Knowledge trapped in inboxes and individual memory creates inconsistency. A governed Knowledge Center makes approved procedures, playbooks, and answers accessible to the right roles.

sections.heading: Approved sources only
sections.body: Aipify learns from administrator-approved knowledge — transparent and auditable, not hidden scraping.

sections.heading: Gap detection
sections.body: When confidence is low, Aipify identifies knowledge gaps and recommends content improvements — humans approve changes.

examples.title: Onboarding path
examples.body: A new support agent asks how refunds are handled → Knowledge search returns the approved policy → Gap flagged if the answer is outdated.

the-future-of-business-operations.title: The future of business operations
the-future-of-business-operations.metaDescription: The next generation of operations software combines intelligence, governance, and human accountability — not uncontrolled automation.
the-future-of-business-operations.introduction: Organizations want speed without losing control. The future belongs to platforms that prepare work, explain reasoning, and require approval for sensitive actions.

sections.heading: Gradual trust delegation
sections.body: Start with drafts and recommendations. Delegate reversible workflows only after explicit policy approval.

sections.heading: Companion-led coordination
sections.body: Aipify Companion helps leaders prioritize and decide — it does not replace ownership or accountability.

examples.title: Policy progression
examples.body: Month 1: Aipify drafts support replies. Month 3: Low-risk replies auto-send within policy. Month 6: Expanded packs with full audit trail.

what-is-a-business-companion.title: What is a business companion?
what-is-a-business-companion.metaDescription: Aipify Companion is executive and operational intelligence — briefings, priorities, and guidance grounded in your business context.
what-is-a-business-companion.introduction: Companion is how Aipify stays present for leaders and teams: calm, professional, and actionable. It is an extension of Aipify — not a separate AI product.

sections.heading: Observation, explanation, recommendation
sections.body: Companion insights include why you are seeing something, why it matters, and what to do next.

sections.heading: One Aipify identity
sections.body: Skills, Centers, and Companion capabilities belong to Aipify — customers interact with Aipify, not a fleet of disconnected assistants.

examples.title: Priority review
examples.body: Companion surfaces three items requiring attention today — each with context, impact, and a prepared next step.

companion-vs-chatbot.title: Companion vs chatbot
companion-vs-chatbot.metaDescription: Chatbots answer questions. Aipify Companion coordinates operational intelligence with governance and accountability.
companion-vs-chatbot.introduction: A chatbot optimizes for conversation. A Business Operating System optimizes for outcomes: support resolved, knowledge current, approvals handled, executives informed.

sections.heading: Operational depth
sections.body: Companion connects to knowledge, calendars, tasks, approvals, and Business Packs — not isolated Q&A.

sections.heading: Never information-only
sections.body: Companion avoids count-only alerts. Every insight includes context and a recommended action when possible.

examples.title: Contrast
examples.body: Chatbot: 'You have 14 notifications.' Companion: 'Three support cases exceed SLA — here is context, impact, and a recommended escalation path.'

companion-vs-ai-assistant.title: Companion vs AI assistant
companion-vs-ai-assistant.metaDescription: Generic AI assistants optimize for general conversation. Aipify Companion is built for governed business operations.
companion-vs-ai-assistant.introduction: Enterprise buyers need explainability, audit trails, and human approval — not open-ended AI that acts without boundaries.

sections.heading: Model-agnostic intelligence
sections.body: Customers purchase Aipify, not a model brand. Intelligence is selected by task behind the scenes.

sections.heading: Human-centered design
sections.body: Companion adapts style through the Identity Engine — familiarity without manipulation or impersonation.

examples.title: Approval boundary
examples.body: Companion prepares a contract summary draft → Presents for review → Human approves → Action logged in Trust Center.

how-companion-supports-organizations.title: How Companion supports organizations
how-companion-supports-organizations.metaDescription: Companion helps executives and operations teams prioritize, decide, and follow through — within approved governance.
how-companion-supports-organizations.introduction: From daily briefings to decision support, Companion reduces context switching while preserving human accountability.

sections.heading: Executive visibility
sections.body: Leadership sees operational health, risks, and prepared decisions — high signal, low noise.

sections.heading: Team coordination
sections.body: Operations and support teams receive actionable guidance connected to knowledge and workflows.

examples.title: Decision support
examples.body: Should we expand warehouse hours? Companion presents options, trade-offs, confidence level, and links to relevant operational data.

human-centered-companion-design.title: Human-centered Companion design
human-centered-companion-design.metaDescription: Aipify Companion is designed to augment people — never to replace judgment, create pressure, or surveil employees.
human-centered-companion-design.introduction: Human-centered design means calm language, transparent limits, and user control over identity, attention, and memory.

sections.heading: No surveillance
sections.body: Aipify does not monitor screens, keystrokes, private files, or browsing history.

sections.heading: Users decide
sections.body: Recommendations prepare and inform. Sensitive actions always require explicit approval.

examples.title: Attention protection
examples.body: Focus mode requires confirmation. Companion respects quiet hours and user preferences for notification levels.

getting-started-with-aipify.title: Getting started with Aipify
getting-started-with-aipify.metaDescription: A practical orientation for organizations evaluating the Aipify Business Operating System.
getting-started-with-aipify.introduction: Aipify installs into your existing environment and learns how your organization works — reducing the need for a separate daily-login admin panel.

sections.heading: Install-first strategy
sections.body: Connect Aipify to your admin, store, or custom system. Map roles to customer-native permissions.

sections.heading: Phased value
sections.body: Start with knowledge and support. Add Business Packs and governed automation as trust grows.

examples.title: First 30 days
examples.body: Week 1: Connect and import knowledge. Week 2: Activate core modules. Week 3: Train team on approvals. Week 4: Review operational metrics.

governance-and-human-approval.title: Governance and human approval
governance-and-human-approval.metaDescription: Aipify recommends. Humans decide. Every sensitive action is explainable and audited.
governance-and-human-approval.introduction: Governance is not a checkbox — it is how enterprises trust operational intelligence at scale.

sections.heading: Action levels
sections.body: Information and drafts require less oversight. Sensitive and critical actions require explicit human approval. Level 4 critical actions are prohibited for AI.

sections.heading: Emergency stop
sections.body: Organizations can pause pending actions instantly while preserving settings and audit history.

examples.title: Refund request
examples.body: Customer requests refund → Aipify prepares recommendation → Manager approves or rejects → Customer notified → Event audited.

enterprise-knowledge-management.title: Enterprise knowledge management with Aipify
enterprise-knowledge-management.metaDescription: Governed knowledge helps organizations respond consistently without storing raw private content in learning memory.
enterprise-knowledge-management.introduction: Enterprise knowledge requires role-based access, approval workflows, and gap detection — not a shared document dump.

sections.heading: Metadata-first learning
sections.body: Aipify stores patterns and approved summaries — not raw email, chat, or payment data.

sections.heading: Employee and customer knowledge
sections.body: Business DNA and Employee Knowledge Engine serve different audiences with appropriate permissions.

examples.title: Role-based access
examples.body: Support sees support procedures. Operations sees runbooks. Executives see summaries — all from approved sources.

hospitality-operations-with-aipify.title: Hospitality operations with Aipify
hospitality-operations-with-aipify.metaDescription: Guest operations, property workflows, and hospitality intelligence — modular and governed.
hospitality-operations-with-aipify.introduction: Hospitality organizations juggle guest communication, property tasks, and staff coordination. Aipify Hosts Business Pack brings operational visibility without replacing your PMS.

sections.heading: Guest coordination
sections.body: Triage guest requests, prepare responses, and escalate when confidence is low.

sections.heading: Property workflows
sections.body: Maintenance, housekeeping handoffs, and operational checklists in one coordinated layer.

examples.title: Late checkout request
examples.body: Guest messages via booking channel → Aipify checks policy and availability → Prepares response → Staff approves → Logged.

property-management-operations-with-aipi.title: Property management operations with Aipify
property-management-operations-with-aipi.metaDescription: Facilities, maintenance, and portfolio operations with executive visibility.
property-management-operations-with-aipi.introduction: Property managers need visibility across units, vendors, and tenant requests — not another disconnected ticketing tool.

sections.heading: Portfolio visibility
sections.body: See open issues, maintenance schedules, and escalations across properties.

sections.heading: Vendor coordination
sections.body: Prepare work orders and follow-ups with audit trails.

examples.title: Maintenance escalation
examples.body: Urgent leak reported → Aipify prioritizes → Notifies on-call vendor path → Manager approves dispatch.

commerce-operations-with-aipify.title: Commerce operations with Aipify
commerce-operations-with-aipify.metaDescription: Order visibility, fulfillment coordination, and support connected to commerce workflows.
commerce-operations-with-aipify.introduction: Commerce teams need operational intelligence across orders, inventory signals, and customer support — especially during peak periods.

sections.heading: Fulfillment visibility
sections.body: Surface delays, exceptions, and customer-impacting issues early.

sections.heading: Support integration
sections.body: Support Operations Pack connects order context to triage and response.

examples.title: Shipping delay
examples.body: Carrier exception detected → Aipify drafts customer notification → Support reviews → Proactive outreach sent.

support-operations-with-aipify.title: Support operations with Aipify
support-operations-with-aipify.metaDescription: Triage, knowledge-backed responses, and escalation with confidence scoring.
support-operations-with-aipify.introduction: Support teams drown in volume without institutional knowledge at their fingertips. Aipify Support Operations combines Business DNA with governed automation.

sections.heading: Confidence-based triage
sections.body: High-confidence, low-risk categories may auto-draft or auto-reply within policy. Uncertainty always escalates.

sections.heading: Knowledge gaps
sections.body: Repeated low-confidence answers create visible gaps for knowledge improvement.

examples.title: Policy question
examples.body: Customer asks about warranty → Knowledge match found → Draft prepared → Agent reviews → Sent with audit.

warehouse-operations-with-aipify.title: Warehouse operations with Aipify
warehouse-operations-with-aipify.metaDescription: Inventory coordination, task handoffs, and operational visibility for warehouse teams.
warehouse-operations-with-aipify.introduction: Warehouse operations depend on timely handoffs and clear priorities — not more dashboards nobody checks.

sections.heading: Task coordination
sections.body: Unified tasks, reminders, and accountability across shifts.

sections.heading: Exception handling
sections.body: Surface stock discrepancies and fulfillment blockers with recommended actions.

examples.title: Pick exception
examples.body: SKU mismatch flagged → Aipify notifies supervisor → Suggests resolution path → Shift lead approves adjustment.

professional-services-with-aipify.title: Professional services with Aipify
professional-services-with-aipify.metaDescription: Client delivery, knowledge reuse, and executive visibility for consulting and services firms.
professional-services-with-aipify.introduction: Professional services organizations sell expertise — operational knowledge and client visibility determine margin and quality.

sections.heading: Delivery playbooks
sections.body: Approved methodologies and templates accessible to delivery teams.

sections.heading: Executive portfolio view
sections.body: Partners see client health, risks, and utilization signals — not raw inbox noise.

examples.title: Client onboarding
examples.body: New engagement starts → Onboarding checklist activated → Companion tracks milestones → Partner briefing prepared.

hosts.name: Aipify Hosts
hosts.metaDescription: Guest operations and hospitality intelligence for property and accommodation businesses.
hosts.headline: Aipify Hosts — hospitality operations
hosts.introduction: Coordinate guest communication, property workflows, and service excellence with governed intelligence.
useCases: Guest request triage and response preparation

1.q: Does Aipify Hosts replace our PMS?
1.a: No. Aipify orchestrates operational intelligence above your existing systems — it does not replace core property management software.

2.q: Can Aipify respond to guests automatically?
2.a: Only within approved policies and confidence thresholds. Sensitive guest situations always require human review.

support.name: Support Operations Pack
support.metaDescription: Customer support triage, knowledge-backed responses, and service coordination.
support.headline: Support Operations — governed customer service
support.introduction: Help support teams respond faster with Business DNA, knowledge, and confidence-based triage.

1.q: Will Aipify replace our support team?
1.a: No. Aipify augments support staff — humans make final decisions on important cases.

2.a: Autonomy level, confidence threshold, category policy, and Business DNA must all align before auto-reply is permitted.

warehouse.name: Warehouse Operations Pack
warehouse.metaDescription: Inventory coordination, task management, and operational handoffs for warehouse teams.
warehouse.headline: Warehouse Operations — coordinated fulfillment
warehouse.introduction: Give warehouse teams shared visibility, prioritized tasks, and exception handling with audit trails.

1.a: No. Aipify coordinates operational intelligence and human-approved actions — not direct equipment control.

finance.name: Finance Operations Pack
finance.metaDescription: Operational finance visibility, reporting, and governed workflows for finance teams.
finance.headline: Finance Operations — visibility with control
finance.introduction: Support finance teams with operational reporting, approval workflows, and executive visibility.

1.a: Critical financial actions require explicit human approval. Refunds and payment changes are high-risk and governed accordingly.
No. Companion is operational intelligence within the Aipify Business Operating System — not a standalone chatbot.

2.a: No. Aipify does not conduct workplace surveillance.

1.a: Aipify is designed for multi-tenant architecture, RBAC, audit logs, SSO readiness, and governed automation.

1.q: Can we start small and expand?
1.a: Yes. Organizations typically begin with core modules and add Business Packs as operational needs grow.

1.q: Is the Growth Partner program affiliate marketing?
1.a: No. Growth Partners are certified business partners — consultants and advisors, not coupon promoters.

1.q: Do we pay for packs we do not use?
1.a: Aipify is modular. Organizations license and activate only the Business Packs they need.

meta.title: Selskap — Aipify Group AS
meta.description: Misjon, visjon, verdier og historien bak Aipify — Business Operating System fra Bergen, Norge.

company.title: Aipify Group AS
company.subtitle: Fra Norge. For verden.
company.intro: Aipify Group AS bygger Business Operating System for moderne organisasjoner — operasjonell intelligens med styring, tillit og menneskelig kontroll.

mission.title: Misjon
mission.body: Styrke mennesker gjennom ansvarlig operasjonell programvare. Aipify styrker team — den erstatter aldri menneskelig skjønn.

vision.title: Visjon
vision.body: Hver organisasjon fortjener ett operasjonelt lag — kunnskap, arbeidsflyt, synlighet og styrt intelligens.

values.title: Verdier
values.body: People First. Technology Second. Visdom før hast. Tillit tjenes, aldri manipuleres.

story.title: Selskapshistorie
story.body: Grunnlagt i Bergen bygger Aipify Group AS mer enn et punktverktøy — et Business Operating System installert der arbeid allerede skjer.

leadership.title: Ledelse
leadership.body: Aipify ledes av operatører og byggere forpliktet til enterprise-programvare og transparent styring.

growthPartners.title: Growth Partners
growthPartners.body: Profesjonelle partnere utvider Aipify — et Growth Partner-program, aldri affiliate.

contact.title: Kontakt
contact.body: Salg, enterprise, partnerskap, support og media har dedikerte kontaktveier.

trust.title: Tillit
trust.body: Kunder eier dataene. Aipify eier intelligenslaget. Sikkerhet og revisjon er synlige.

careers.intro: Vi forbereder en karriereopplevelse i tråd med verdiene våre.
careers.emptyMessage: Åpne stillinger vises her etter hvert som Aipify skalerer.
